title: Web3 Investor Skill Configuration
description: Configuration schema for Web3 Investor Skill. This file defines the structure and validation rules for config.json. For detailed usage, see SKILL.md and references/*.md

_comment.description: Optional comment field for documentation purposes

chain.description: Blockchain network configuration. Defines which chains are supported and their RPC endpoints.

default.description: Default chain for transactions. 'base' recommended for lower gas fees.

supported.description: List of supported chains for discovery and trading

rpc.description: RPC endpoints for each chain. Multiple URLs enable automatic failover.

api.description: Local signer API configuration. The signer service holds private keys and signs transactions. This skill does NOT store private keys.

url.description: Signer API base URL. Should be localhost for security. Never expose to public internet.

timeout_seconds.description: Request timeout for signer API calls

security.description: Trading security constraints. These rules protect against accidental high-risk transactions.

max_trade_usd.description: Maximum single transaction value in USD. Transactions exceeding this will be rejected.

max_slippage_percent.description: Maximum allowed slippage for DEX trades. Higher values accept more price impact.

whitelist_enabled.description: Enable/disable whitelist enforcement. When false, all tokens/protocols are allowed. When true, only whitelisted items are allowed.

whitelist_tokens.description: Allowed tokens for trading. Only effective when whitelist_enabled is true.

whitelist_protocols.description: Allowed protocols for interaction. Only effective when whitelist_enabled is true.

double_confirm.description: Additional confirmation requirements for high-risk transactions

enabled.description: Enable double confirmation for flagged transactions

large_trade_threshold_usd.description: Triggers double confirmation for trades above this USD value

high_slippage_threshold_percent.description: Triggers double confirmation for slippage above this percentage

new_protocol_confirm.description: Require confirmation for protocols not in whitelist

confirm_phrase.description: Phrase user must type to confirm high-risk transactions

preflight.description: Pre-execution validation checks. These are run before any transaction to ensure readiness.

enabled.description: Enable preflight checks before transaction execution

min_gas_eth.description: Minimum ETH balance required for gas (in ETH)

checks.description: List of checks to run for each transaction type

fallback_enabled.description: Enable automatic fallback to secondary RPC URLs

session_sticky.description: Stick to same RPC during a session for consistency

discovery.description: Investment opportunity discovery configuration. Controls how the skill searches for DeFi and RWA opportunities.

data_sources.description: Priority order of data sources. 'mcp' = MCP servers (RWA products), 'dune' = Dune Analytics, 'defillama' = DefiLlama API

mcp.description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server configuration. MCP servers provide structured data access for AI agents.

enabled.description: Enable MCP data source for RWA products

cache_ttl_seconds.description: Cache time-to-live in seconds. RWA products rarely change, so 5 minutes (300s) is recommended.

servers.description: List of MCP servers to query. Multiple servers are supported for different product providers.

name.description: Unique identifier for this MCP server

fallback_url.description: Fallback URL if primary is unavailable

dune.description: Dune Analytics MCP configuration. Dune provides on-chain analytics through SQL queries.

auth.description: Authentication configuration. API key should be stored in environment variable DUNE_API_KEY.

env_var.description: Environment variable name containing the API key

min_apy.description: Minimum APY percentage to include in results. Use 0 to see all opportunities.

max_results.description: Maximum number of opportunities to return per query
